title: Kuepferia otophora
taxonomy: Kuepferia otophora is classified as a species within the genus Kuepferia, which is a member of the family Achariaceae. The Achariaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the chatanoo or poroporo family. The Achariaceae family is part of the larger order Malpighiales, which is a diverse group of flowering plants found in tropical and subtropical regions. Malpighiales is part of the clade Eurosids I, which is a large group of flowering plants that also includes the rose family and the spurge family. The clade Eurosids I is part of the larger group known as flowering plants, or angiosperms.

Its roots and other parts are believed to possess antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are used to treat various health issues.
